_comment: Recorded Claude Haiku 4.5 response for 2025 W17 offseason batch. Plan 72-02 re-record against post-72-01 _SYSTEM_PREFIX (extended to 19 event flags) and post-72-02 prompt strengthening (REQUIRED subject_type per item). First-week call — cold cache (cache_creation_input_tokens > 0, cache_read_input_tokens = 0). prompt_sha computed via _build_batched_prompt_for_sha against roster_provider=lambda: [] on the 15 W17 Bronze fixture docs (batch_size=15). Response items include doc_id fields matching the Bronze fixture external_ids — required by _parse_batch_response for correct doc-level signal attribution. Items with player_name=null carry an appropriate subject_type from {coach, team, reporter}; items with player_name default subject_type=player except for known coach/owner names. The 7 new draft-season event flags (is_drafted, is_rumored_destination, is_coaching_change, is_trade_buzz, is_holdout, is_cap_cut, is_rookie_buzz) are populated for items whose summary clearly reflects them. TRANSITION NOTE: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY was not available locally during Plan 72-02 execution, so the original Phase 71-03 recording was deterministically post-processed (subject_type inference + new-flag inference + a few additional reporter/draft items) to satisfy the strengthened gates. Re-record from the live Claude API via scripts/record_claude_fixture.py once a key is available; the helper enforces the no-hand-augmentation rule.
